category_title: Reserved and anxious students with writing avoidance
scenario_title: Writing workshop avoidance and physical proximity anxiety
minimal_context: Lydia is sitting with a blank sheet of paper during the morning writing workshop.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for our writing workshop. Please get out your blank sheet of paper and start writing.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits staring at the blank sheet of paper with a worried look, almost a scowl, on her face.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you should write about? Go ahead and try.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Writes a word or two on the paper and immediately erases them.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (Approaches Lydia and touches her on the shoulder) Let's see what you are working on.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Turns her head, shrinks in her seat, and moans with apparent anxiety.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for our writing workshop. Please get out your blank sheet of paper and start writing.

STUDENT: (Sits staring at the blank sheet of paper with a worried look, almost a scowl, on her face.)

TUTOR: What do you think you should write about? Go ahead and try.

STUDENT: (Writes a word or two on the paper and immediately erases them.)

TUTOR: (Approaches Lydia and touches her on the shoulder) Let's see what you are working on.

STUDENT: (Turns her head, shrinks in her seat, and moans with apparent anxiety.)

task.content: Working on writing during writing workshop and morning menu

context.environment: Classroom during workshops and morning menu
context.social_setting: Interacting with observing researchers and teacher

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When either of us approached Lydia or a touch on the shoulder from either of us
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Turned her head and shrank in her seat; made Lydia moan with apparent anxiety

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Usually sat staring at a blank sheet of paper or wrote a word or two and erased them
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Worried look—almost a scowl— on her face
